[2018-05-14 08:58] shadourow (Rando): I indeed think that we should be more precise than "card game"
[2018-05-14 08:58] f300xen (f0x): prismata is a turn-based RTS
[2018-05-14 08:58] shadourow (Rando): When itsotter talk about "a random deck in a card deck" he didn't refer to poker

[2018-05-14 08:59] f300xen (f0x): prismata is a digital beveled interactive rectangle game
[2018-05-14 08:59] p0lari (Polari): is puzzle strike a card game?
[2018-05-14 08:59] apooche: I feel like card games are games that utilize the fact that cards scan be stacked and shuffled
[2018-05-14 08:59] p0lari (Polari): or is it reasonable to call it one
[2018-05-14 08:59] apooche: If your game doesn’t do those things, it probably isn’t a card game
[2018-05-14 08:59] itsotter: to me the essential point is that you don't build a deck of prismata units and then bring it into every game you queue for, like in hearthstone
[2018-05-14 09:00] totally_not_fbi (Totally Not FBI): card game usually consists of hand-dealing and innate variance/randomness associated with it
[2018-05-14 09:00] itsotter: every time you queue and get a game, you have to learn how to play a new game because you haven't seen this unit set before
[2018-05-14 09:00] totally_not_fbi (Totally Not FBI): prismata doesnt have hand dealing or card drawing
[2018-05-14 09:00] totally_not_fbi (Totally Not FBI): all it has is dominion-like random set generating
[2018-05-14 09:00] itsotter: in hearthstone, you learn a deck and can then queue 1000 times with the same one you already know
[2018-05-14 09:00] totally_not_fbi (Totally Not FBI): whihc unforunately shares the namesake of "card game"
[2018-05-14 09:00] p0lari (Polari): is poker not a card game?
[2018-05-14 09:00] totally_not_fbi (Totally Not FBI): poker is a card game
[2018-05-14 09:00] darkeisbein: Poker is not a card game because there is no Deckbuilding :Lul:
[2018-05-14 09:00] p0lari (Polari): it doesn't have deckbuilding
[2018-05-14 09:01] f300xen (f0x): prismata is not a card game because its tiles can be replaced with things that don't look like cards
[2018-05-14 09:01] apooche: I mean in 40k you bring the same set of units to every game, but that isn’t a card game
[2018-05-14 09:01] shadourow (Rando): Also, Prismata is an "information complete game" where you share the possibilities with your opponent (more or less :x)
[2018-05-14 09:01] apooche: Hearthstone is a card game because you shuffle and draw
[2018-05-14 09:01] totally_not_fbi (Totally Not FBI): yeah that really differentiates pris from card games
